faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Gravesend typically costs between $350 and $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Gravesend home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants indoors, especially in spring. Carpenter ants are often spotted near kitchens, bathrooms, or areas with moisture damage in Gravesend homes.

faqs.question: How long does carpenter ant treatment take?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-2 hours, with most infestations requiring follow-up visits over 2-4 weeks to ensure complete colony elimination. Our technicians will create a customized treatment plan based on your specific infestation and provide a clear timeline during your inspection.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-friendly and eco-conscious treatment options during your consultation.
